$comment: Waiver entry shape: {id, case_or_finding, why_intentional, approved_by, date, expires?}. case_or_finding must be an exact case or finding id. A sweep passes only with zero unexplained drift: every finding is fixed or covered by an active waiver.

waivers.why_intentional: specs/SPEC.md cites Constitution Arts. XLVII-XLVIII while the schema string stays rapp-protocol/1.0. Adjudicated: both articles are policy-only (no central registry; no PII by default) and carry no normative field or wire change, so no version bump is due. 1.0 remains correct.
waivers.approved_by: Fable 5 adjudication, session authorized by Kody Wildfeuer

waivers.why_intentional: ECOSYSTEM.md section-3 diagram root and schema examples still show the pre-ratification bare-UUID form. Presentation lag, explicitly covered by the canon clause that pre-ratification rapp-rappid/1.1 bare-UUID seeds remain valid (UUID hex, dashes stripped, IS the hash). Prose cites Art. XXXIV.1 correctly. Cleanup optional, not drift.
waivers.approved_by: Fable 5 adjudication, session authorized by Kody Wildfeuer

waivers.why_intentional: kody-w/heimdall rappid.json is a canonicalized v1-to-v2 migration (rappid hex is the exact nibble sequence of _migrated_from UUID; identity preserved). Legacy forms are read forever per the Eternity invariant; forward-normalization happens on next natural emit, never as a rewrite.
waivers.approved_by: Fable 5 adjudication, session authorized by Kody Wildfeuer

waivers.why_intentional: Frozen planted spec bundle advertising the v2 identity format. Already tracked open-by-design (kody-w/public-art-collective issue #5) awaiting the documented specs-refresh ritual; refreshing it out-of-ritual would violate the planted-bundle discipline.
waivers.approved_by: Fable 5 adjudication, session authorized by Kody Wildfeuer
